treatment_information.treatment_response: Patient was seizure free for a few days before discharge.
Biopsy consistent with inflammation/infection rather than lymphoma.
Given for infection; the specific response is not clear.

treatment_timeline.event: ibrutinib was held while determining the management for infection.
A follow-up brain MRI showed worsening of affected areas.
Patient discharged and follow-up appointments arranged.

patient_outcome.final_status: Patient was safe for discharge with symptoms controlled on Keppra.
patient_outcome.follow_up_details: Follow-up appointments arranged; patient advised not to drive due to seizure risk.
patient_outcome.complications: No complications noted from the brain biopsy.
patient_outcome.long_term_prognosis: Worsening affected areas on follow-up imaging indicate a need for close monitoring.
patient_outcome.quality_of_life: Patient reports inability to perform daily activities involving fine movement.
patient_outcome.patient_perspective: Patient reports recurrent seizure activities post-discharge.
